DASHBOARD.WELCOME_TEXT: Manage your sector markers (A1-I9), set resource positions and share them with your server. Use /map set [Sector] [Type] to place markers!

PLUGIN_SETTINGS.TITLE: Plugin Settings
PLUGIN_SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Configure DuneMap to your preferences: Storm timer, timezone, map channel and more.
PLUGIN_SETTINGS.INFO: Settings can be found in the bot configuration under "DuneMap"

COMMANDS.TITLE: Available Commands
COMMANDS.DESCRIPTION: Use these Discord commands to interact with the map:
COMMANDS.MAP_SET: Place marker in sector A5 of type "titan"

EMPTY_STATE.TITLE: No Markers Yet
EMPTY_STATE.DESCRIPTION: Your server hasn't placed any markers yet. Start by setting markers in Discord with the /map set command!

MARKER_TYPES.TITLE: Available Marker Types
MARKER_TYPES.ERROR: Marker type data could not be loaded

STORM_FORMAT.LABEL: Storm Timer Format
STORM_FORMAT.HELP: Display format for the storm timer in Discord messages

CORIOLIS_REGION.LABEL: Coriolis Storm Server Region
CORIOLIS_REGION.HELP: Select your server region for accurate storm times (resets every Monday)

TIMEZONE.LABEL: Timezone
TIMEZONE.HELP: Timezone for all time calculations and displays

AUTO_RECALC.LABEL: Automatic Timer Recalculation
AUTO_RECALC.HELP: Automatically recalculates the storm timer after each cycle

DURATION.LABEL: Storm Timer Duration
DURATION.HELP: Duration of a complete storm cycle

CHANNEL.LABEL: Map Channel
CHANNEL.HELP: Discord channel where the map is displayed and updated
CHANNEL.ERROR: Channel list could not be loaded. Please enter the Channel ID manually.

HELP.TITLE: Help
HELP.STORM_TEXT: The storm timer tracks the Dune storm cycle. It can be displayed in different formats and timezones.
HELP.AUTO_TEXT: When enabled, the timer automatically starts a new cycle after the storm ends.
HELP.CHANNEL_TEXT: The channel where the DuneMap is posted and automatically updated with new markers.
HELP.SECTORS_TEXT: The map consists of 81 sectors (A1-I9). Rows A-E are PvE zones, Rows F-I are PvP zones.

API.MISSING_REMOVE_PARAMS: Missing parameters: markerId OR (sectorX, sectorY, markerType) required

ADMIN.TITLE: Interactive Sector Map
ADMIN.DESCRIPTION: Click on a sector (A1-I9) to place or remove markers.
